details.reasoning: The implementation fully meets all rubric requirements. A new ImageTextToTextPipeline class was added with an async _call method that accepts images and text prompts. The pipeline correctly uses AutoModelForImageTextToText, processes pixel_values through the processor, calls model.generate() to produce output, and returns properly formatted generated_text objects. The pipeline is registered in SUPPORTED_TASKS with type 'multimodal' and includes all necessary components (tokenizer, model, processor). Comprehensive JSDoc documentation is provided with proper @typedef declarations for ImageTextToTextSingle, ImageTextToTextOutput, and the callback type. The implementation follows existing pipeline class patterns (similar structure to DocumentQuestionAnsweringPipeline) and makes no modifications to existing code. Only additions were made to the codebase as required.
